task_description: Add SNS notifications for pipeline completion and errors. Create two encrypted SNS topics (Completed, Failed), integrate SNS Publish tasks into the Step Functions state machine on success and error paths, ensure least-privilege IAM, and update ARCHITECTURE.md. Follow strict TDD (failing tests first).

verification.summary: All 36 tests pass (28 existing + 8 new SNS tests). cdk synth succeeds cleanly. 100% code coverage on cdk_base/. Tests verify SNS topic count, KMS encryption, state machine definition content (sns:publish action, state names, ordering), IAM permissions, and error handling preservation.
